signature_motif: Hooked pale jaw plate under a low shoulder wedge, with a dry mane ridge that stays readable in both stalking and hunting poses.
selected_reasons: keeps the prowler visually small while giving it a sharper, more authored identity than the generic marsh-hound pass
the hooked jaw reads instantly at native scale and stays distinct from Charger, Boomer, Heart Runner, and Akedra's spear
its low cautious crouch and forward hunting lean separate clearly without needing UI help or oversized effects
the compact body still supports the approved defensive and hunting pounce frames without looking boss-sized

rejected_weaknesses.Bristlemane Prowler: Strong neck silhouette, but the heavier mane risks muddying the face read and makes the body feel more generic from a distance.
rejected_weaknesses.Hollow Hound: Memorable skull-mask head, but it leans too eerie and airy compared with the grounded physical combat roster.

candidates.title: Bonejaw Prowler
candidates.palette_summary: peat-black hide, dry reed mane, pale hooked jaw plate, hot ember eye
candidates.silhouette_summary: Low shoulder wedge, heavy pale jaw hook, and the clearest stylized predator read without growing beyond the approved gameplay footprint.
candidates.signature_motif: Oversized hooked lower jaw plate that hangs below the snout like scavenged bone armor.
candidates.weakness_summary: Most readable overall, but it gives up some of Variant B's mane flair to keep the body mass compact and gameplay-legible.

candidates.title: Bristlemane Prowler
candidates.palette_summary: charred bark hide, thorn-bristle mane, muted bone muzzle, blood-red hostile eye
candidates.silhouette_summary: A reed-backed skirmisher with the strongest mane profile and the roughest wild-dog outline of the three candidates.
candidates.signature_motif: Tall bristled mane ridge that makes the cautious crouch and aggressive lean easy to separate.
candidates.weakness_summary: The mane reads well, but the head becomes slightly more generic from a distance and the body risks blending into dark ground tiles.

candidates.title: Hollow Hound
candidates.palette_summary: cold charcoal hide, hollow bone mask, dusty sage back plane, ember socket eye
candidates.silhouette_summary: A gaunter skull-faced tracker with the eeriest head read and the narrowest ribcage of the three.
candidates.signature_motif: Bone mask head with a hollow socket cut and tucked, almost carrion-bird neck posture.
candidates.weakness_summary: Memorable face silhouette, but it drifts a little too spectral compared with the grounded physicality of the selected live direction.
